name: Golden Chicken Nuggets
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients.
2. Dip each piece of chicken in the butter, then roll in the crumb mixture.
3. Place the pieces in a single layer on an ungreased baking sheet.
4. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 12-15 minutes, or until juices run clear.
5. Yield: about 4 dozen.
